Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0803 "LITTLESARASISTER2-0803" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Little Sara Sister 2 (Ice Team - 2013).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Changed the JMP $0803 instruction at $0905 to be JMP $2912 instead to skip the trainer menu
